title: Agent Pipeline & Business Logic
goal: Audit the core agent system — agent pipeline (6-agent orchestration loop), types, contracts, prompts, fallback templates, dreaming cycle, weekly learning, guard system, MCP servers. Focus on reliability, completeness, error handling, fallback behavior, and architectural soundness.
acceptance_criteria: Identify at least 3 critical issues in the agent pipeline (orchestrator, contracts, prompts, fallbacks)
Evaluate the dreaming/learning cycle for robustness
Assess the guard system for safety completeness
Flag any missing error handling or fallback gaps

title: LLM Infrastructure & Integrations
goal: Audit the LLM client architecture — OpenAI/Anthropic integration, BYOK key management, LLM resolution and routing, chat operator, usage metering, MCP communications, email integration, memory system, Temporal workflows. Focus on provider abstraction, key security, cost tracking, and integration reliability.
acceptance_criteria: Identify at least 3 critical issues in LLM client/key management
Evaluate integration quality (email, MCP, Temporal, chat)
Assess usage metering for accuracy and scalability
Flag security concerns with API key handling and provider resolution

title: Frontend, Data & API Architecture
goal: Audit the frontend architecture — Next.js App Router pages, API route handlers, React components, Prisma schema and generated models, Zod validations, data flow patterns, Supabase auth provision. Focus on route organization, data fetching patterns, component structure, schema design quality, and API design consistency.
acceptance_criteria: Identify at least 3 critical issues in frontend or API design
Evaluate Prisma schema design (relationships, indexes, migrations)
Assess API route error handling and validation patterns
Flag any data flow or state management concerns

title: Backend, Security & Infrastructure
goal: Audit the Python FastAPI backend, authentication system, crypto/encryption, infrastructure configuration, Docker setup, testing coverage, and devops maturity. Focus on backend security, auth integrity, deployment readiness, and test quality.
acceptance_criteria: Identify at least 3 critical issues in backend or security
Evaluate auth system (Supabase, JWT, OAuth, sessions) for vulnerabilities
Flag infrastructure gaps (Docker, CI/CD, testing coverage, error monitoring)
